title: calliandra estebanensis
intro: Calliandra estebanensis, a flowering plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calliandra estebanensis are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
